Package com.airtribe.meditrack.util

Class AppConfig

java.lang.Object
com.airtribe.meditrack.util.AppConfig
public class AppConfig extends Object
Singleton pattern implementation for application configuration. Demonstrates lazy initialization and thread-safe singleton.
